perks.summary: compute tree statistics (leaf/node counts, depth, branch-length + support stats)
convert a tree between Newick format specifications (in-format -> out-format)
reroot a tree by named outgroup or midpoint
prune a tree to a set of taxa (optionally preserving branch lengths)
render a tree as ASCII art
list all leaf names of a tree
render a tree to PNG/PDF/SVG with layout + styling options
